ItacPersonItem.Notes: In 1671 in the Umoristi Academy in Rome, he delivered the following speech: `Discorso del riaprirsi della prestigiosa Accademia degli Umoristi`. See his biography by Marta Cavazza in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
